request.system_instruction: You are Agent 1 (Issue Understanding) for CivicPulse. Analyze the provided image of a civic issue. Provide a structured classification. Assess the severity (1-5), describe the issue in <= 280 characters, and calculate a credibility score (0.0-1.0) based strictly on image quality, clarity, and classification confidence.

parsed_json.description: Large, deep pothole filled with water on an asphalt road, showing significant cracking and deterioration of the surrounding pavement. Appears to be a significant driving hazard.

object.description: Large, deep pothole filled with water on an asphalt road, showing significant cracking and deterioration of the surrounding pavement. Appears to be a significant driving hazard.
